setup_task.sh line 12: PROJECT_DIR=/home/ga/IdeaProjects/LibraryClient; export_result.sh line 9 confirms same path
setup_task.sh line 40: HttpServer.create(new InetSocketAddress(8081), 0); port verified in netstat checks at lines 113-114

setup_task.sh line 41: server.createContext('/api/books', new BooksHandler()); lines 67-86 implement GET (line 67) and POST (line 70) methods. verifier.py lines 56 and 63 check for both endpoints

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Java-based HTTP server on localhost:8081 with hardcoded book data (Design Patterns, Clean Code, The Pragmatic Programmer). The server logs all requests to /tmp/library_server_access.log. The task expects agents to create a file named library_tests.http in the LibraryClient project directory (/home/ga/IdeaProjects/LibraryClient) and execute GET and POST requests to /api/books endpoints via IntelliJ IDEA's HTTP client feature.
